Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to create a Python dictionary representing a DECLARE model in pm4py format for the given product design and launch process The prompt gives the structure a dictionary with keys as listed the constraint types

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For unary constraints existence absence exactly one init are dicts mapping activity to another dict with support and confidence Usually pm4py has support and confidence values

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Typical pm4py DECLARE model is like existence activity support confidence and for binary constraints key being a tuple activity one activity two

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: I will assume that for binary constraints the key is a tuple and for unary constraints the value is a dict with support and confidence

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: It does not specify which rules exactly so we need to invent a reasonable set of DECLARE constraints that capture the product design and launch process

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: The constraints can be based on typical ordering mandatoriness exclusivity and typical process flow

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The activities are IG DD TFC CE PC LT UT AG MP FL

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Idea Generation must occur at least once Final Launch must occur exactly once The process should start with Idea Generation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Design Draft after Idea Generation Technical Feasibility Check and Cost Evaluation after Design Draft Prototype Creation after both TFC and CE Laboratory Testing and User Testing after Prototype Creation Approval Gate after testing Marketing Plan after approval Final Launch after marketing

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Use succession constraints for the main dependencies since they combine response and precedence and are cleaner than listing both separately

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The process might have parallel activities TFC and CE after DD and before PC so no order is imposed between TFC and CE and no direct constraint is added between them

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus succession constraints are IG DD DD TFC DD CE TFC PC CE PC PC LT PC UT LT AG UT AG AG MP MP FL

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Set support to 1 point 0 and confidence to 1 point 0 for all rules assuming perfect compliance

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Absence and negative constraint dictionaries can remain empty because no forbidden activities or explicit negative relations are given in the scenario

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus the dictionary contains existence for all ten activities exactly one for IG and FL init for IG succession for the eleven dependency pairs and empty dictionaries for the other DECLARE templates
